title: Repair Telegram Mini App launch/open failure
acceptanceCriteria: Reproduce and record the user-visible launch symptom before the fix.
Record the exact Mini App URL that Telegram launch paths try to open.
Probe the intended public HTTPS /miniapp route and record status, redirects, content-type, and body identity.
Prove the root cause category without substituting assumptions for repository/runtime evidence.
Preserve public HTTPS Mini App access through Caddy without exposing generic public /api/*.
Add focused regression coverage for the repaired launch/routing behavior.
Complete builder verification, fresh read-only verifier pass, and task validation.
